name: Coconut Fried Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 8 scoops of ice cream on a cookie sheet and freeze for at least 1 hour or until firm.
2. Combine eggs and vanilla in one bowl and mix well. Divide the mixture into two bowls and cover half with foil. Chill.
3. In another bowl, combine cookie crumbs and coconut flakes. Divide this mixture into two bowls and set aside half.
4. Dip each ice cream scoop into the egg mixture, then dredge through the crumb mixture. Place on a cookie sheet and freeze for at least 1 hour or until firm.
5. Remove from the freezer and dip again in the remaining egg mixture, then dredge in the remaining crumb mixture. Return to the cookie sheet.
6. Cover with foil and fry in deep hot oil (375°F) for 30 seconds or until golden brown. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately.
